tasks.title: ConPTY process and I/O pipeline
tasks.summary: Implement the ConPTY spawn path and terminal I/O pipeline.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify passthrough is the default path and gate detection logs the OS build (Win11 22H2+ floor, ADR-0002)
manual: verify standard ConPTY mode works under CMUX_CONPTY_MODE=standard — shell spawns and I/O flows
manual: verify CMUX_PIPE_NAME, CMUX_PANE_ID, CMUX_SURFACE_ID injected on shell spawn
manual: verify CMUX_CONPTY_MODE=standard env override bypasses passthrough gate

tasks.title: libvterm wrapper + terminal buffer
tasks.summary: Wrap libvterm and define the terminal buffer integration.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify parser path uses libvterm — no custom VT parser code exists in src/
manual: verify VtermWrapper.PushBytes() correctly updates TerminalBuffer for basic VT100 sequences (color, cursor move, erase)
manual: verify libvterm source exists only in ports/libvterm/, not in vendor/ or any other path

tasks.title: Direct2D renderer
tasks.summary: Implement the Direct2D/DirectWrite renderer for published frames.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify dirty-region-based redraw path — full-screen clear does not redraw unchanged cells
manual: verify D2D draw runs on UI thread (not background) per adr-0001 threading table
manual: verify glyph cache invalidated on DPI change

tasks.title: SwapChainPanel host integration
tasks.summary: Attach the terminal renderer to the WinUI 3 SwapChainPanel host.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify terminal panel survives reparent — ConPTY session remains alive after split move
manual: verify reattach_token increments on Detach() and triggers SetSwapChain() re-call
manual: verify terminal panel disposed state releases ConPTY → libvterm → D2D in that order

tasks.title: IME + UIA
tasks.summary: Implement IME rect updates and baseline UIA support.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify IME candidate window placement aligns with terminal cursor pixel rect
manual: verify IME rect recalculated immediately on DPI change (DpiChanged event)
manual: verify Narrator or NVDA can read current line text via UIA TextPattern
manual: verify caret move and viewport change UIA events are raised

tasks.title: In-terminal find overlay + per-panel search state
tasks.summary: Implement the terminal find overlay UI and per-panel search state with open/next/prev/close behavior.
acceptance_auto: tc-find-open-focus: find action triggers overlay over active terminal panel and focuses the input box
tc-find-counter-sync: query input updates match_count and counter renders as N / M
tc-find-wrap-around: next/prev wraps match_index and scrolls the highlighted match into the viewport
tc-find-state-restore: closing then reopening the overlay restores the previous query and flags
tc-find-state-survives-reparent: moving the panel (hidden→attached) preserves search state

tasks.title: Shared panel abstraction (IPanel)
tasks.summary: Define the IPanel interface and make TerminalPanel implement the six lifecycle verbs so layout code stays type-agnostic.
acceptance_auto: tc-ipanel-single-collection: TerminalPanel is storable through an IPanel pointer in a single heterogeneous collection
tc-ipanel-lifecycle-verbs: IPanel exposes Attach/Focus/Blur/Hide/Detach/Dispose and TerminalPanel maps them per 04 §11.2
tc-ipanel-no-concrete-branch: layout code contains no dynamic_cast to a concrete panel type (content router excepted)

tasks.title: Milestone AT gate (acceptance_manual drain)
tasks.summary: Human/AT checkpoint: execute every queued acceptance_manual item in this milestone and record results before the milestone rolls up to done.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify every acceptance_manual item of this milestone's tasks was executed and its result (pass/fail/skip + 사유) recorded in this task's notes
notes: commands: [] — human/AT gate task; done 전환은 사람 검증으로만 수행한다 (plans/README.md 'AT gate 규칙'). 자율 루프는 이 task를 집지 않는다.
